# Auth Example

This example demonstrates Ed25519 signature creation and verification using the auth message type. Requires libsodium. Spec does not mandate the signature algorithm.

```
$ make run
```

## Output

```
Auth type:  3
Timestamp:  230549194
Length:     64 bytes

Page count: 4
Signature:
b0 55 5e 6f 4c ee a2 4c  b9 01 b1 0a 01 05 bc f0
26 b2 35 e6 40 18 8f b0  ed 8d 59 27 55 e2 51 32
cb 69 ab 38 c9 a0 31 22  5c ca 62 dc 0c 9f c9 35
dd be 18 d7 b0 bd 26 c2  4d d8 32 9c 3d 15 99 09

b0555e6f4ceea24cb901b10a0105bcf026b235e640188fb0ed8d592755e25132cb69ab38c9a031225cca62dc0c9fc935ddbe18d7b0bd26c24dd8329c3d159909

Auth pages:
Page 0:
22 30 03 40 ca e6 bd 0d  b0 55 5e 6f 4c ee a2 4c
b9 01 b1 0a 01 05 bc f0  26

Page 1:
22 31 b2 35 e6 40 18 8f  b0 ed 8d 59 27 55 e2 51
32 cb 69 ab 38 c9 a0 31  22

Page 2:
22 32 5c ca 62 dc 0c 9f  c9 35 dd be 18 d7 b0 bd
26 c2 4d d8 32 9c 3d 15  99

Page 3:
22 33 09 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00

Message pack:
f2 19 09 02 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 12 03 b5 ff
7e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 00 00 00 00 32 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 52 00
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
22 30 03 40 ca e6 bd 0d  b0 55 5e 6f 4c ee a2 4c
b9 01 b1 0a 01 05 bc f0  26 22 31 b2 35 e6 40 18
8f b0 ed 8d 59 27 55 e2  51 32 cb 69 ab 38 c9 a0
31 22 22 32 5c ca 62 dc  0c 9f c9 35 dd be 18 d7
b0 bd 26 c2 4d d8 32 9c  3d 15 99 22 33 09 00 00
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00 00 00 00

Verify with:
$ ./example_verify 
```

```
$ ./example_verify 
Auth type:  3
Timestamp:  230549039
Page count: 4
Length:     64 bytes

Signature:
6a 0a 51 9e 2c c9 77 c6  d3 a1 72 bb ad 43 2f e8
60 73 af 16 44 47 54 31  0f 50 18 db e4 52 0d 5c
80 cc 6d a4 3a b0 ce c9  c7 ed 1a d2 7e 9b 27 ee
5c df aa 7f 83 44 78 eb  8c 81 f6 0d e7 e1 0c 02

Signature verified.
```
